prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次约2979→3878→13495（2023年断档异常）→3883→5522，排除2023年断档值后近4年整体后移，2025年基准约5522名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年28人、2022年32人、2023年32人、2024年30人、2025年37人；2026年计划44人，较2025年扩招约18.9%，招生名额明显增加，竞争压力有 所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第59名（2026年排名），近年稳定在50–60名区间，属于中上游211水平；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，主要 涉及宿舍安检等校园管理话题，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第41位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；历史投档异常记录中未见暨南大学断档信号；新闻传播学A、工商管理A、应用经济学A-、中国语言文学A-、生物学A-、药学A-，共6个A-及以上学科，经管与人文社科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与暨南大学物理类招生专业（计算机、人工智能、电气工程等）匹配度高，有利于吸引优质生源；青海省2026年普通 高考总人数约48000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计47669人基本持平，按历史比例估算物理类约30672人，与2025年30457人相近，较2024 年理科本科一段343分略有上升，反映整体竞争略有加剧；暨南大学位于广东广州，属一线城市，对西北省份考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生人数较 少（2026年物理类44人），属小规模招生，位次波动弹性较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5522名、2026年扩招约18.9%使竞争缓和、，扩招带来的宽松效应略占主导，但近年位次后移趋势和工科专业热度上升形成对冲；预测2026年物理类最低位次约6099名，区间5599–6599名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics/Science category was approximately 2979 → 3878 → 13495 (abnormal gap in 2023) → 3883 → 5522. Excluding the 2023 gap, the overall trend over the past 4 years has shifted backward, with a baseline of about 5522 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Science/Physics category was 28 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 37 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 44, an increase of about 18.9% compared to 2025, significantly expanding enrollment and alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 59th on the Soft Science main list (2026 ranking), stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management topics such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 41st (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is acceptable. No abnormal gap signals were found in historical admission records for Jinan University. Disciplines: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, with a total of 6 A- or above disciplines, highlighting strong economics, management, and humanities/social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, matching well with Jinan University's Physics category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Engineering, etc.), which helps attract high-quality students. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000, basically flat compared to the 2025 total of 47,669 (Physics + History categories). Estimated by historical proportion, the Physics category has about 30,672 candidates, similar to 2025's 30,457, and slightly higher than the 2024 Science first batch cutoff of 343 points, reflecting a slight intensification of overall competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city, which has some regional appeal to candidates from northwestern provinces. The university enrolls a small number of students in Qinghai Province (44 in Physics category in 2026), making it a small-scale enrollment with high ranking volatility.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5522, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18.9% eases competition. The easing effect from expansion slightly dominates, but the recent backward trend in rankings and rising popularity of engineering majors create a counterbalance. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics category will be about 6099, with a range of 5599–6599.

The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan: 2021: 21, 2022: 17, 2023: 17, 2024: 17, 2025: 19. The 2026 plan is only 12, a reduction of about 36.8% compared to 2025, significantly reducing enrollment and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 59th (2026 ranking), stable in the 50–60 range in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 41st (relatively hot), moderate application attention; no gap signal in historical admission anomalies for Jinan University; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, strong disciplinary strength in economics, management, literature, and law, highly matching history category majors (Accounting, Chinese Language, Radio and Television, International Economics and Trade, etc.).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1836, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 36.8% significantly intensifying competition, the recent continuous backward trend in rankings, stable university reputation, and divergent major popularity, the enrollment reduction effect and ranking backward trend jointly point to intensified competition; predict the 2026 history category minimum ranking to be about 1400, with a range of 1148–1652.
